creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Mon, Oct 23, 2000 at 05:11:32PM +0000, Jordan Nelson wrote:
> 
> >Number:         22259
> >Category:       gnu

This should be ports since bash is not a part of the system.

> >Synopsis:       root directory change directory bug
> 
> 	Bash 2.04 allows you to change to the // directory
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 
> 	bash-2.04$ cd //
> 	bash-2.04$ pwd
> 	//
> 

This is not a FreeBSD-only problem (if it really is a problem).  This
bug reports should go to the bash maintainers, not FreeBSD.

-- 
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
